li.label: Ate raw medicinal herbs
li.description: Ingesting raw medicinal herbs. Bitter... hard to swallow, perhaps it wasn't worth wasting this medicinal herb.

li.label: Ate lantern berries
li.description: The flesh is sweet and mildly euphoric, which shouldn't be addictive, right?

li.label: Ate tillandsia dragon shoot
li.description: My throat is burning! Why am I eating this?!

li.label: Thran spirit haunt
li.description: Bursts of low laughter ring in your ears, and in an instant, extreme happiness, pain, jealousy, and anger rush into your brain.
